case_title: OPORTUN INC. VS. CARLOS PATRICIO GALEN SOSA

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $2,500.00 FILED BY OPORTUN INC. AS TO DEFENDANT SOSA, CARLOS PATRICIO GALERA ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JUL-13-2018 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506
ORDER RE: CONTINUED FOR PROGRESS REPORT (SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT FOR DETAILS)
DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) FILED BY PLAINTIFF OPORTUN INC.
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF SEP-12-2018 - JUDGMENT.

IS PRESENT, REPRESENTED BY JHONATTAN HERRADA, LEGAL COLLECTIONS SPECIALIST. DEFENDANT IS NOT PRESENT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE PRO TEM: JEAN MILEFF; CLERK: G. FELICIANO; NOT REPORTED. 506

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF SEP-12-2018 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF SEP-12-2018 BY CHRISTINE VAN AKEN. 506 PLAINTIFF OPORTUN INC. IS PRESENT, REPRESENTED BY PRISCILLA TOVAR, LEGAL COLLECTIONS SPECIALIST. DEFENDANT IS NOT PRESENT. PLAINTIFF EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: CHRISTINE VAN AKEN; CLERK: G. FELICIANO; NOT REPORTED. 506

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF OPORTUN INC. RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT SOSA, CARLOS PATRICIO GALERA $2,421.28 PRINCIPAL, $105.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $2,526.28, THE COURT DISALLOWS LATE FEES IMPOSED AFTER 6/4/18 BECAUSE THE TOTAL BALANCE BECAME DUE ON DEFAULT IMMEDIATELY PURSUANT TO THE LOAN AGREEMENT. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS PLAINTIFF'S EXHIBITS RECEIVED
